title: Lightning explorer + LAN-feel video scrub
description:
PipeShare folder browsing and video scrubbing are much faster and more dependable.

Explorer: job boot and folder opens use shallow one-level listings (Wasabi Delimiter), like ShareFile Children — not giant recursive trees. Opening a folder hydrates its children immediately.

Video: scrubbing updates the time label while you drag and seeks once on release (object storage cannot do true LAN scrub without HLS). Presigns are cached until near expiry and skip an extra Wasabi HeadObject on every open.

Who is affected: PipeShare on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Shallow tree API (shallow=1) for fast one-level folder listings.
Boot explorer with shallow root; hydrate children when a folder opens.
Seek-on-release video scrubbing to cut Wasabi Range spam while dragging.
Longer TTL-aware video presign cache; faster /presign without HeadObject.
preload=metadata for remote video to reduce aborted Range requests.
